tiles.name: bunny_dig3
tiles.says: G'day lad! I've been digging all day... I just love tunnels!

tiles.name: fly1
tiles.says:
Bzzzz...
Been dodging these frogs since breakfast, hah!

tiles.name: frog_blink
tiles.says:
Rib... Rib...
You see that fly? I've been chasing it all morning.

tiles.name: frog_hop_left
tiles.says:
Hop! Hop!
No time to talk, pal! Too much hopping to do...

tiles.name: frog_hop_right
tiles.says:
Hop! Hop!
No time to talk, pal! Too much hopping to do...

tiles.name: frog_swim1
tiles.says:
Rib... Rib...
Hop in, buddy. Plenty of water to go around!

tiles.name: frog_sit1
tiles.says: Croak! I've been sitting on my butt all morning. What a day!

tiles.name: frog_hunt
tiles.says:
Dreamed I got turned into a fancy prince...
Brrr, the horror!

tiles.name: mug
tiles.says:
I'M CAFFEINATED!
That little camper will never catch us alive...

tiles.name: mug_sleep
tiles.says:
I snuck out of my tent, teehee!
Bean and I are finally together!

tiles.name: holt
tiles.says: Hmmm, I lost my favourite coffee mug. I'm sure I packed it...

tiles.name: bunny_left
tiles.says: Not now, froggy! I'm busy nibbling on this delicious greenery...

tiles.name: bunny_right
tiles.says:
Omnomnom...
I'm going to be nibbling on these plants all day!

tiles.name: worm_left
tiles.says: I'm just a worm! Good luck with your quest, little froggy.

tiles.name: tent_front
tiles.says: Oi! Stay out of my tent little critter! I lost enough already...

tiles.name: tent_back
tiles.says: Oi! Stay out of my tent little critter! I lost enough already...

tiles.name: bunny_look
tiles.says: Hi buddy... help yourself! There's enough grass for everyone!

tiles.name: bunny_flip
tiles.says: Nom! I love plants! Almost as much as I love digging tunnels!

tiles.name: bunny_dig1
tiles.says: Nice hops, green friend! You would make an excellent bunny one day!

tiles.name: bunny_dig2
tiles.says:
Omnomnom...
Do you have any carrots? Because I love carrots!

tiles.name: bunny_right 2
tiles.says: Hop, hop! Hopping helps me keep  the intrusive thoughts at bay.

tiles.name: fly2
tiles.says:
Buzz, buzz...
Too slow, slime legs! You'll never catch me!

tiles.name: fly_buzz
tiles.says: Why are you disturbing our home peace? Scurry off, punk!

tiles.name: fly_fizz
tiles.says: Don't mind Buzz, he always gets   a bit fussy about his Feng Shui...

tiles.name: frog_sit2
tiles.says:
Ribbit!
Nice day for a swim in the pond, don't you think?

tiles.name: frog_snacky
tiles.says:
Ribbit...
My keen eyes can spot snacks from miles away!

tiles.name: frog_swim2
tiles.says:
Rib... Rib...
Hop in, buddy. Plenty of water to go around!

tiles.name: worm_right
tiles.says:
I wonder...
Would he still love me if I weren't a worm?!

tiles.name: bird
tiles.says: My song woke up the whole pond again? Tough luck, losers!

Want to give it another try?
Repeat the same notes we sing!

We don't remember any of our songs!
Can you help us rehearse,

Hmm, that didn't sound right...
I think we can do better than that!

Yes, splendid!
We'll serenade you at the pond tonight!
Perfect timing! The sun is about to set... Are you ready to go?
